description: In this episode of the Solana Changelog, Nick from the SLA Foundation DevRel team discusses updates including SIMD187 stricter ELS headers, Agave version 2.1 pre-release, and QWIK improvements led by Alessandro. The conversation highlights security enhancements and breaking changes in dependencies.
topic_summary: Updates on SIMD187 headers [t=19:84], Agave version 2.1 [t=106:07], and QWIK improvements [t=208:92].
